title: zanthoxylum yakumontanum
intro: Zanthoxylum yakumontanum, also known as Japanese prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in East Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum yakumontanum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve pain, and reduce fever, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
